name: PM-KISAN (Pradhan Mantri Kisan Samman Nidhi)
how_to_apply: Apply at pmkisan.gov.in or nearest CSC centre

name: PM Fasal Bima Yojana (Crop Insurance)
benefit: Subsidised crop insurance for Kharif and Rabi crops — premium 2% for Kharif, 1.5% for Rabi, 5% for horticulture
eligibility: Farmers growing notified crops in notified areas
how_to_apply: Apply through your bank or insurance company before sowing

name: Kisan Credit Card (KCC)
benefit: Low interest crop loan (4% after subvention), up to ₹3 lakh without collateral
how_to_apply: Apply at any nationalised bank or cooperative bank

name: PM Krishi Sinchayee Yojana (Irrigation)
benefit: Up to 55% subsidy on drip and sprinkler irrigation for small/marginal farmers
eligibility: Small and marginal farmers investing in micro-irrigation
how_to_apply: Apply through your state agriculture department

name: eNAM (National Agriculture Market)
benefit: Online mandi platform for better price discovery across markets
eligibility: Any farmer or trader registered with a participating mandi

name: Soil Health Card Scheme
benefit: Free soil testing and a health card every 2 years, with fertilizer recommendations for your field
how_to_apply: Contact your nearest Krishi Vigyan Kendra (KVK)
